finding_results.evidence: Remaining comparative 'the way [noun/pronoun] [verb]' instances: chapters/chapter_08.md:57 (watering hole), chapters/chapter_08.md:71 (sneeze), chapters/chapter_08.md:291 (twelve years), chapters/chapter_08.md:291 (body learns rhythm). Total: 4. No two compare domestic to professional-past.
finding_results.notes: Removed or restructured 10 instances across lines 3, 5, 9, 25, 71 (original line 71 stuffed-animals), 85, 113, 119, 125, 285. Line 3: replaced 'the way the refrigerator's click had been absorbed' with appositional 'another constant, like.' Line 5: replaced professional-past comparison with direct enumeration ('every pipe, every pressure drop, every forty-minute cycle'). Line 9: 'the way Dan performed' changed to 'as Dan performed.' Line 25: 'the way a corporate sponsor's brand appears' changed to 'like a corporate sponsor's brand.' Line 73: 'the way other children carried stuffed animals' replaced with 'like a thing he might lose.' Line 87: removed with the 'she knew' declaration. Line 115: removed Dan-phone comparison. Line 121: removed with analytical-frame declaration. Line 125: two adjacent instances restructured to 'how Theo had leaned into it — that lean, a piece of information.' Line 287: removed professional-meeting comparison. Retained strongest: watering-hole (57), sneeze (71), closing-breath pair (291).

finding_results.evidence: Remaining 'she knew' declarations in first half (lines 3-121): chapters/chapter_08.md:3 ('Mira knew it was 6:15 because she had made it 6:15'), chapters/chapter_08.md:7 ('She hated that she knew these sounds'), chapters/chapter_08.md:9 ('She could have told you the exact width'). Total: 3. Hyperawareness conveyed through detail at chapters/chapter_08.md:39, chapters/chapter_08.md:87, chapters/chapter_08.md:121.
finding_results.notes: Restructured three passages to convey hyperawareness through observational precision rather than narratorial declaration. Line 39: 'She knew the dimensions because the infrastructure classification document had included them — 11'2" x 9'4", to be precise' became 'The kitchen was eleven feet by nine — 11'2" x 9'4", to be exact, per the infrastructure classification document' — dimensions surface as Mira's unbidden knowledge. Line 87: 'She knew this too. She knew the whole apartment the way she'd once known organizational charts — every node, every connection, every load-bearing wall, and not a single thing she could do with the knowledge' became 'Every node, every connection, every load-bearing wall — mapped, catalogued, and useless' — the precision carries the knowing. Line 121: 'She was always listening. The analytical frame... the data it returned was this: Dan shifted on the couch at 10:14' became simply 'Dan shifted on the couch at 10:14' — the timestamps enact the listening.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:53-55. Theo picks up the signed permission slip, slides off his chair, carries it across the kitchen to Dan at the stove counter ('See? Mom already signed it.'), then crosses back to the table. Both parents watch him pass between their zones, their eyes meeting briefly above his head before each looks away.
finding_results.notes: Added Theo's physical movement in the morning scene. The movement is child-natural (showing Dad the slip), incidental rather than choreographed. The parents' brief eye contact over Theo's trajectory creates the connection moment required by the chapter spine beat ('Theo as diplomatic bridge between his parents — his physical movement through the apartment connecting their separate zones'). The existing watering-hole observation follows immediately, contextualizing the tracking behavior.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:267 ('Her throat tightened on the last word'), chapters/chapter_08.md:281 ('her breath hitched — a small catch behind her sternum, her left hand opening at her side for a half-second before she closed it').
finding_results.notes: Added somatic registration at two moments. At the 'I wouldn't have' moment (line 267): throat tightening — a physical confirmation of what the sentence is reaching toward. At the near-passing (line 281): breath hitching (respiratory), catch behind sternum (internal), hand opening involuntarily then closing (motor) — three somatic details located in Mira's body. Both maintain the chapter's quiet register: desire is registered and managed, not enacted. The hand-opening-and-closing renders the cost of not-touching as a physical event.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:121 ('twelve years of marriage'), chapters/chapter_08.md:285 ('the bed they'd shared for twelve years'), chapters/chapter_08.md:291 ('the way she'd done for twelve years'). All three references now unified at twelve years.
finding_results.notes: Changed line 285 from 'eleven years' to 'twelve years' to match the two other references (lines 121 and 291). The continuity sheet confirms the Kessler marriage at twelve years. No contextual distinction (e.g., bed predating marriage) was supported by the text, so the discrepancy read as an error.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:87 — 'Every draft, every hinge, every board that groaned underfoot — memorized, catalogued, and useless.' replaces corporate vocabulary (node, connection, load-bearing wall) with physical/sensory detail. chapters/chapter_08.md:5 retains the single allowed mapping reference ('because mapping was what she did'). chapters/chapter_08.md:121 conveys analytical tracking through timestamped sounds (10:14, 10:31, 11:02) without stated comparison.
finding_results.notes: Replaced organizational-chart vocabulary at line 87 with physical/sensory detail (draft, hinge, groaning board) to show Mira's analytical habit through the precision of observed detail rather than through a stated domestic-to-professional comparison. The one allowed mapping reference at line 5 is retained. No explicit '[home thing] the way she [professional thing]' formula remains in the chapter.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:3 — 'protocols neither of them had written down' (introduction/thesis). chapters/chapter_08.md:127 — 'no protocol covered 1:47 a.m.' (subversion). chapters/chapter_08.md:291 — 'the only protocol no one had written down and everyone followed' (synthesis). Exactly 3 instances verified by search. Former instances at line 85 replaced with 'discipline' and at line 147 replaced with 'hers since the first week'. Duplicate 'protocols' at line 3 ('writing protocols down') changed to 'writing such things down'. Former duplicate 'no one's protocol' at line 127 replaced with 'belonged to no one'.
finding_results.notes: Reduced from 5 to exactly 3 instances of 'protocol/protocols'. The three surviving instances form the thesis-disruption-synthesis arc specified by the acceptance test: rules exist (line 3), an exception breaks them (line 127), a deeper rule emerges (line 291). At line 85, 'discipline' maintains the 'its own X, its own negotiated silence' rhythm while removing the institutional label. At line 147, 'hers since the first week' grounds the cabinet claim in temporal specificity rather than abstracting it as a protocol.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_08.md:121 — Sound-catalogue sentence broken into three: list sentence (~35 words), 'She knew that posture.' (4 words), closing (~20 words). chapters/chapter_08.md:281 — Passing sentence broken from ~130 words into three: smell/proximity (~64 words), breath-hitch (~23 words), polysyndeton exit (~27 words). chapters/chapter_08.md:285 — Apartment-holding sentence broken after 'occupied alone' (~77 words); 'Dan's side was cool and smooth.' (7 words) creates rhythmic break; hospital-corner detail follows (~40 words). chapters/chapter_08.md:287 — Refrigerator sentence broken at analytical-to-predictive pivot (~109 words); 'She would tell him in the morning.' (7 words) provides short declarative; closing polysyndeton (~40 words). Final sentence at line 291 (~116 words) is now the longest sentence in the closing pages.
finding_results.notes: Four rhythm interventions in the back half of the chapter. Each break inserts at least one short declarative sentence (4-7 words) between longer passages. The final sentence at line 291 is now the clear rhythmic crescendo — no preceding sentence in the closing two pages exceeds its length. The polysyndeton in the passing sentence (line 281) and closing paragraph (line 287) is preserved to maintain the emotional momentum of those sequences. The 'She knew that posture.' insertion at line 121 strengthens the moment by giving Mira's recognition its own beat.

pass_summaries.summary: All five findings addressed. ch08-prose-01 (HIGH): reduced 'the way' comparative construction from 11+ instances to 4, retaining the watering-hole, sneeze, and closing-breath pair; no two survivors compare domestic to professional-past. ch08-craft-01: restructured 3 declarative passages (lines 39, 87, 121) so hyperawareness is conveyed through observational precision rather than narrator announcement; 3 declarations remain in the first half. ch08-craft-02: added Theo's physical movement between parents' zones via the permission-slip crossing in the morning scene. ch08-craft-03: added somatic responses at the 'I wouldn't have' moment (throat tightening) and the near-passing (breath hitch, sternum catch, hand opening). ch08-craft-04: unified marriage duration to twelve years across all three references. Collateral churn minimized — edits are surgical, preserving surrounding prose, character voice, and chapter architecture.

All three prose/copyedit findings addressed. (1) The mapping-formula repetition is eliminated: corporate vocabulary at line 87 replaced with physical sensory detail; the one allowed mapping reference at line 5 is retained; line 121 conveys analytical tracking through timestamped precision alone. (2) 'Protocol' reduced from 5 to exactly 3 instances forming a thesis-disruption-synthesis arc across the chapter. (3) Rhythmic variation restored in the back half: four long sentences broken with short declarative insertions; the final sentence is now the longest in the closing pages, arriving as a clear crescendo after rhythmically varied setup. All edits preserve the chapter's aesthetic register, character voices, continuity details, and heading contract. No content softened or sanitized.
